overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a forested lakeshore. The weather transitions from overcast to heavy rain as the character wades into the water, with a wooden railroad bridge visible in the distance throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested lakeshore path with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy lakeshore toward a distant wooden bridge, flanked by pine trees

entered.detail: long wooden trestle bridge spanning the lake in the distance
large moss-covered boulder at the water's edge
calm lake water reflecting the overcast sky
tall pine trees with sparse autumn foliage lining the shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy forested lakeshore under overcast skies. A wooden railroad bridge spans the lake in the distance, while a large boulder sits at the water's edge to the right. Tall pine trees line the path as the camera follows the character forward.

events.description: rain begins to fall, transitioning from overcast to light rainfall
character steps off the grassy shore into the shallow lake water

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as rain begins to fall, stepping from dry ground into the lake shallows

segments.scene_description: Rain begins to fall as the character approaches the water's edge. The large rock boulder passes out of view behind, while the wooden bridge draws closer. The character steps into the shallow lake water, transitioning from grass to water surface under increasingly rainy conditions.

events.description: rider on white horse gallops through the water from left to right in the background

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep water toward the distant shore as heavy rain falls

notable_agents.action: rider on white horse galloping through the shallow water from left to right

entered.detail: tree-lined shore on the opposite side of the lake emerging through the rain

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the lake in heavy rainfall, with the wooden bridge now visible to the left rear. A rider on a white horse suddenly gallops through the water from left to right in the mid-ground. The distant forest shore becomes visible through the rain ahead as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forested lakeshore that transforms from a quiet, overcast walk into a trek through heavy rainfall. It begins with the character walking past tall pine trees and a large boulder at the water's edge, with a wooden railroad bridge visible in the distance. As the character approaches the shoreline, rain begins to fall and the camera moves from the grassy bank into the shallow lake water. The scene then shifts into a heavy downpour as the character wades deeper, with the wooden bridge receding to the left rear. Finally, a rider on a white horse gallops across the mid-ground from left to right before the camera continues forward toward the distant, rain-shrouded forest shore.
